name: SocietyBee
category: Billing, Accounting & Bye-Law Compliance Software for Co-operative Housing Societies
businessDescription: SocietyBee is billing, accounting and bye-law compliance software for Indian co-operative housing societies, built for the CAs and treasurers who run the books, not for gate passes and visitor logs. Multi-society from one login, zero payment-gateway commission, and an AI assistant (BeeAgent) that reads your ledger and bye-laws.
targetAudience: CAs, chartered accountants, treasurers and managing committee members of Indian co-operative housing societies
